### 📋 Summary
<!-- Berikan ringkasan singkat tentang perubahan ini -->

### 🛠️ Changes Details
<!-- List the specific technical changes made. Since this is a large PR, please group them if possible -->
- **feat**: Fitur baru untuk pengguna.
- **fix**: Perbaikan bug.
- **refactor**: Perubahan kode yang tidak menambah fitur atau memperbaiki bug.
- **perf**: Perubahan kode untuk meningkatkan performa.
- **build**: Perubahan pada sistem build, docker, atau dependensi.
- **ci**: Perubahan pada konfigurasi CI/CD (GitHub Actions).
- **chore**: Pemeliharaan rutin (update lang, config, dll).

### 🚀 Impact
<!-- Describe how these changes affect the rest of the application or the user experience -->
- *Breaking Changes:* [Yes/No]
- *Performance:* [e.g., Improved loading time, No significant change]
- *Dependencies:* [e.g., Added 'axios', Updated 'react']

### ✅ Verification
- [ ] Application builds without errors (`php artisan optimize:clear`).
- [ ] All automated tests passed (`php artisan test`) on local environment.
- [ ] Verified on local environment.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if applicable).
